name: Placekey
description: Placekey — Free universal place identifier joining POI datasets across data providers using a standardized key.

seo.title: Placekey — Maps / Geolocation / Routing
seo.meta_description: Placekey: Placekey — Free universal place identifier joining POI datasets across data providers using a standardized key.

when_to_use: Joining disparate POI datasets using a universal place key
Free standardized identifier linking foot traffic to address data
Cross-provider location data enrichment without custom joins
Matching location datasets across vendors with one shared key
Enabling data collaboration between partners with Placekey

pros: Free universal ID for joining POI datasets
Solves merge conflicts across data providers
Simplifies data engineering for location joins
cons: Only useful if partners also use Placekey
Not a replacement for geocoding or maps
review.verdict: Elegant standard for joining POI datasets; value depends on ecosystem adoption growing.
review.best_for: Data teams merging location datasets from multiple vendors
review.not_for: App developers just needing basic map display

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
